source_file: Second Amendment to Equity Incentive Plan(1).docx
document_title: SECOND AMENDMENT TO A INC. 2023 EQUITY INCENTIVE PLAN

paragraphs.text: SECOND AMENDMENT TO A INC. 2023 EQUITY INCENTIVE PLAN
This Second Amendment to the A Inc. 2023 Equity Inventive Plan (this “Amendment”) is made and entered into effective as of [●], 2025, by A Inc., a Delaware corporation (the “Company”).
WHEREAS, the Company previously adopted the A Inc. 2023 Equity Inventive Plan (as amended from time to time, the “Plan”);

WHEREAS, pursuant to a Unanimous Written Consent of the Company’s Board of Directors (the “Board”), dated as of [●], 2025 and the Written Consent of the Company’s Stockholders (the “Stockholders”), dated as of [●], 2025, the Board and the Stockholders approved an increase of the number of shares of the Company’s common stock reserved for issuance under the Plan to 1,976,969 (the “Plan Reserve Increase”);
WHEREAS, pursuant to Section 18(a) of the Plan, the Board may amend the Plan at any time; and

WHEREAS, the Board and the Stockholders desire to amend the Plan with the Plan Reserve Increase and the Company has caused its authorized officer to execute this Amendment to effectuate the Plan Reserve Increase.
NOW THEREFORE, the Company hereby agrees and the Plan is hereby amended as follows:
The first sentence of Section 3(a) of the Plan is hereby amended by deleting “1,579,894 Shares” and inserting in lieu thereof “1,976,969 Shares”.

Except as expressly modified by this Amendment, the Plan remains in full force and effect pursuant to its terms. All references to the Plan in other documentation shall be deemed to be a reference to the Plan as amended by this Amendment.
This Amendment shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware without reference to the conflict of laws provisions thereof.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the undersigned has caused this Amendment to be duly executed effective as of the date first written above.
